description: General atmospheric conditions suitable for any world setting.
weather: A violent electrical storm with crashing thunder and driving rain.
A thick blanket of mist that muffles sound and hides the distance.
A merciless sun beating down from a cloudless sky.
Heavy, steady rain that drenches everything it touches.
An eerie calm where nothing moves and no wind stirs.
Soft white flakes drifting down to blanket the world.
A rising wind that tugs at clothes and bends the trees.
A low, gray sky pressing down like a heavy lid.
Bright air with perfect visibility to the horizon.
Oppressive heat that shimmers off every surface.
A damp haze that blurs the edges of the world.
Dark clouds gathering on the horizon, promising fury.
on the coldest night of the year
A biting cold that seeps through every layer.
Silver light flooding the landscape from a round moon.
The warm, amber glow just before sunset.
The first pale light breaking over the edge of the world.
The last fading light as day surrenders to night.
A soft wind that carries scents and cools the skin.
A thin layer of ice crystals coating every surface.
Crimson and gold leaves drifting down from bare branches.
A fine, persistent rain that soaks through slowly.
Complete darkness with no stars or moon to light the way.
The dim, blue-grey light between sunset and full dark.
